label: DEC Air Quality Advisories for Lake Ontario

comments.text: Dense smoke from fires in Manitoba continues to swirl around the province and neighboring Saskatchewan and Ontario... headed for the Northern U.S. and Great Lakes this weekend.
Would y'all smoke a bong if the water was lake Michigan water? I'm looking as a veeeery cute portable beach bong but like every1 is telling me that's disgusting

DEC continues to closely monitor potential smoke impacts from wildland fires in western Canada. Air quality in Western and Central NY, Eastern Lake Ontario, Adirondacks, and New York City is forecast to be “moderate” for today, with no health advisories.
Michigan Department of Environment, Great Lakes, and Energy (EGLE) launches new air quality dashboard, MiAir: air-egle.hub.arcgis.com

The big fire in Manitoba covers an area the size of Lake Ontario. Anyone here ever looked from the shore of Lake Ontario? You can sometimes pick up lights across the lake, but only @ the thinner ends. I grew up and lived within a couple km's of this lake until I moved to BC. Now, imagine it on fire.

Hi it's me again from NW Ontario The western half of 🇨🇦 from Lake Superior to BC has been dealing with yearly fire smoke far longer than Southern Ontario has deigned to notice it. Kindly: Fuck off with thoughts & prayers. Do something about climate change & fire prevention #cdnpoli #onpoli #fires

DEC and .bsky.social issued an air quality health advisory today, June 8, for Upper Hudson, Adirondacks, Eastern Lake Ontario, Central & Western NY regions. 👉 Latest AQI forecast: extapps.dec.ny.gov/cfmx/extapps...
☎️ Air Quality Hotline: 1-800-535-1345
😷 Vulnerable groups, take precautions

The Michigan Department of Environment, Great Lakes and Energy issued an air quality advisory Friday night effective through Saturday for elevated levels of ozone and fine particulate (PM 2.5) in the Metro Detroit area.

DEC and .bsky.social have issued an air quality health advisory for TODAY, August 5, to include fine particles for the NYC Metro, Lower & Upper Hudson Valley, Adirondacks, Eastern Lake Ontario, Central NY and Western NY regions.

An Air Quality Health Advisory has been issued for Sunday, Aug. 3, 2025, for the Northern and Western, including the Eastern Lake Ontario region and the Adirondacks due to the impact of smoke from Canadian wildfires.

That is categorically not Alberta smoke. Alberta's fires are not the major smoke contributor at present, and hardly any of our smoke is reaching the Great Lakes, it's cycling internally and blowing to the Arctic. Buffalo is getting smoke from nearby.
Places like Michigan and Ontario.

Welp....now it's smokey! Lake Ontario looks like fog but it's smoke. Air quality not so good.

Greetings from the North Channel of Lake Huron (N. Ontario) where the weather is picturesquely perfect and entirely smoke-free. For now. What have I missed? (Please be as brief as possible, but skip nothing pertinent to any new indictments of Trump, or any co-conspirators named Rudy or Roger.)
Our school’s playground just north of Toronto on Lake Ontario, had a thin layer of smoke from the prairies! That’s long distance SMOKE!

The New York State Department of Environmental Conservation and the State Department of Health have issued an Air Quality Health Advisory for Eastern Lake Ontario, Central New York, and Western New York regions.

DEC and .bsky.social have issued an Air Quality Health Advisory for TODAY, August 6, for Fine Particles in the the Lower Hudson Valley, Upper Hudson Valley, Eastern Lake Ontario, Central New York, and Western New York regions.

The advisory for smoke enhanced fine particulate matter pollution remains in effect for the NYC Metro, Lower Hudson Valley, Upper Hudson Valley, Adirondacks, Eastern Lake Ontario, and Central and Western New York regions due to the impact of smoke from wildfires in Canada.
I'm just south of Lake Ontario and its been smokey and hazy all day here.

In my experience, a bon fire burns higher than a camp fire. You could have a small bon fire, so long as it was a tall one. But this is coming from a rural backwater origin where we'd scavenge driftwood on the rocky shores of Lake Ontario.
Good evening, Ken! There's an air quality advisory where I'm at in southwestern Ontario and through much of the Great Lakes region. Have a great evening, my Dear Friend!!

The WiscoDISCO campaigns explored lower atmospheric properties of the Lake Michigan shoreline at Chiwaukee Prairie, WI during episodes of high ozone. Ozone in excess amounts near the surface is harmful for human health, and field campaigns like this are paramount to understanding how ozone forms.
Was kinda smokey on Lake erie in Sandusky today.

An air quality statement remains in effect for Thursday, a tentative deal is reached between Unifor Local 195 at Best Western Plus in #Windsor, and a dramatic rescue on Middle Island in Lake Erie. All the evening headlines on the go. #YQG

Smoke from these fires stretches from western to eastern Canada, blanketing parts of the U.S. in toxic haze.
Fine particles like PM2.5 pose serious health risks. Lake Superior and Hudson Bay are clearly within the smoke path.
Northern U.S. states are under a thick, smoky dome.

DEC and .bsky.social have issued an air quality health advisory today, June 6th, for the Adirondacks, Eastern Lake Ontario and Western NY regions. 👉 View the Latest Air Quality Index (AQI) forecast: extapps.dec.ny.gov/cfmx/extapps...
☎️ Air Quality Hotline: 1-800-535-1345 or 1-518-402-8478

Smokey air from the Manitoba and Saskatchewan forest fires is now all the way to central Ontario along Lake Ontario. Can’t image how bad it is in Manitoba and Saskatchewan. Thinking of all of you there and hoping for heavy rains for you. Stay safe!! 🔥😢🇨🇦

The Department & DEC issued an air quality health advisory for ozone for Eastern Lake Ontario & WNY regions, & an air quality health advisory with Fine Particles as the pollutants concern for Adirondacks & CNY.
AQI forecast: extapps.dec.ny.gov/cfmx/extapps...
Air Quality Hotline: 1-800-535-1345

There is an air quality health advisory for smoke-enhanced fine particles today, July 14th, for Central NY, Eastern Lake Ontario, and Western NY regions. 👉 Latest AQI forecast: extapps.dec.ny.gov/cfmx/extapps...
☎️ Air Quality Hotline: 1-800-535-1345 erie.gov/air

Be Air Aware: Visible smoke and hazy skies are likely and New York State may see temporary spikes in smoke-related pollution, particularly in the Adirondacks, Western New York, and Eastern Lake Ontario regions. DEC is tracking air quality statewide in real-time.

Be Air Aware: Visible smoke and hazy skies are likely and New York State may see temporary spikes in smoke-related pollution, particularly in Western and Central NY and Eastern Lake Ontario regions. DEC is tracking air quality statewide in real-time.
